lsp.justification: Mostly matches the GT: it correctly identifies the 3 worker threads, per-worker `bio_jobs`/`bio_jobs_counter` under `bio_mutex[worker]`, separate `bio_comp_list`/`bio_mutex_comp`, unlocked pipe, atomic AOF fields, and immutable `server.bio_cpulist`. It loses full credit because it incorrectly includes `bio_threads[worker]`, which the GT explicitly excludes since `bioProcessBackgroundJobs` never touches it, and it does not separately inventory the mutex globals themselves as shared state.
